abstract: Comprehensive Storybook 9+/10 reference for AI agents and LLMs working with TypeScript/React component libraries. Contains 44 rules across 8 categories — setup & configuration, CSF3 story authoring, args/argTypes/controls, decorators & composition, interaction testing (play functions + Vitest addon), accessibility (axe-core via @storybook/addon-a11y), documentation & design system (autodocs/MDX/tokens/Figma), and build/deployment (Vite, on-demand bundling, Chromatic, CI caching). Each rule includes incorrect/correct examples in modern CSF3 + `satisfies Meta` form, plus When-NOT-to-use guidance for principle conflicts. Targets Storybook 9+ APIs (`storybook/test` import path, `parameters.a11y.test = 'error'`, destructured `canvas`/`userEvent` in play, `@storybook/addon-vitest` for CI).
